menu.file.import_ply: Import PLY, SOG, SPZ, RAD, USD

getting_started.title: Getting Started
getting_started.description: Learn how to prepare datasets and get started with LichtFeld Studio:

about.title: LICHTFELD STUDIO
about.description: A high-performance C++ and CUDA implementation of 3D Gaussian Splatting for real-time neural rendering, training, and visualization.

asset_manager.title: Asset Manager
asset_manager.property.name: Name
asset_manager.geometry.title: Geometry
asset_manager.status.select_item: Select an item to view details
asset_manager.dialog.enter_folder_name: Enter name for the new folder:
asset_manager.url_import.subtitle: Download one asset file or one dataset archive into the asset library. Archives are extracted automatically after download.
asset_manager.url_import.archives_line: .zip, .tar.gz, .tgz, .tar.bz2, .tbz2, .tbz, .tar.xz, .txz, .tar containing datasets or supported asset files
asset_manager.url_import.providers_line: Public or signed HTTPS URLs from S3, GCS, R2, Dropbox, HuggingFace, and GitHub
asset_manager.tooltip.refresh: Rescan all asset directories and update catalog metadata
asset_manager.tooltip.clean_missing: Remove catalog entries whose files no longer exist on disk

training.tooltip.penalty_weight: Weight for opacity penalty in background regions
training.tooltip.mask_mode: How to use attention masks: segment, ignore background, or alpha-consistent
training.tooltip.use_alpha_as_mask: Use alpha channel from RGBA images as mask source instead of separate mask files
training.tooltip.use_depth_loss: Load depth maps and use them for depth-map supervision during training
training.tooltip.depth_loss_mode: Scale-and-shift-invariant depth supervision; selects how the monocular depth prior is interpreted
training.tooltip.depth_loss_weight: Weight applied to the depth loss (decays exponentially during training)
training.tooltip.use_normal_loss: Load normal maps from the normals/ folder (e.g. generated by the preprocess tool) and supervise rendered surface normals during training
training.tooltip.normal_loss_weight: Weight applied to the normal loss
training.tooltip.normal_consistency_weight: Weight of the depth-normal consistency term (rendered normals vs normals derived from rendered depth)
training.tooltip.normal_flatten_weight: L1 penalty on each splat's smallest scale axis while normal supervision is active; flattens splats so their normals are well-defined
training.tooltip.step_scaling_unlocked: Manual: training parameters are not auto-scaled.
training.tooltip.tile_mode: Number of tiles the 3DGUT rasterizer splits the image into
training.tooltip.steps_scaler: Scale training steps. Auto-set from image count (1.0 for <=300 images, images/300 for more)
training.tooltip.tv_loss_weight: Total variation loss for bilateral grid
training.tooltip.stop_refine: Last refinement step. In MRNF, adding new splats stops at Grow Until Iter.
training.tooltip.grow_until_iter: Last MRNF step that can add new splats
training.tooltip.extent: Bounding box size for random init
training.tooltip.max_width: Maximum image width in pixels. 0 keeps native resolution.
training.tooltip.use_16bit_color: Train with 16-bit color images (HDR); cache is lossless JPEG 2000
training.tooltip.test_every: Use every Nth image as test set
training.tooltip.enable_eval: Enable evaluation during training (computes PSNR/SSIM on test set). Slightly reduces training speed.
training.tooltip.save_steps: Iterations at which to save checkpoints AND run evaluation (if Enable Eval is checked). Evaluation always runs at the same iterations as checkpoints.
training.tooltip.btn_stop: End training and keep current result
training.tooltip.ppisp: Per-camera appearance correction (exposure, vignetting, color, CRF)
training.tooltip.ppisp_controller: Enable controller CNN for novel view synthesis
training.tooltip.ppisp_activation_step: Iteration when controller training begins. Negative values default to iterations - round(5000 * max(steps_scaler, 1)).
training.tooltip.ppisp_controller_lr: Learning rate for the controller network
training.tooltip.ppisp_freeze_gaussians: Freeze Gaussian parameters during controller training
training.tooltip.strategy_gut_conflict: igs+ strategy is not available when GUT is enabled
training.tooltip.gut_strategy_conflict: GUT is not available with igs+ strategy. Switch to MCMC first.
training.tooltip.opt.depth_loss_mode.ssi: Auto-detect per image whether the prior is disparity-like or depth-like
training.tooltip.opt.depth_loss_mode.ssi_disparit: Prior is disparity-like (larger = closer), e.g. Depth Anything or MiDaS output
training.tooltip.opt.depth_loss_mode.ssi_depth: Prior is depth-like (larger = farther), e.g. metric depth models
training.conflict.strategy_gut_start_message: GUT cannot be used with igs+ strategy. Choose an action to start training.
training.conflict.strategy_gut_strategy_message: This strategy is incompatible with GUT. Disable GUT to switch?
training.save_pc.title: Modified Point Cloud
training.save_pc.message: The point cloud has been modified. Save to the dataset folder for future sessions?

tooltip.btn_switch_edit: Switch to edit mode for the trained scene
tooltip.ppisp_freeze_from_sidecar: Load PPISP weights from a sidecar file
tooltip.ppisp_sidecar_path: Path to the PPISP sidecar file
tooltip.ppisp_sidecar_browse: Browse for a PPISP sidecar file
tooltip.bg_color: Solid background color used during training
tooltip.bg_image_path: Path to the background image used during training
tooltip.dataset_images: Image subfolder name within the dataset (e.g. images, images_4)
tooltip.grow_scale_2d: Densify when 2D screen-space scale exceeds this
tooltip.prune_scale_2d: Prune when 2D screen-space scale exceeds this
tooltip.pause_refine_after_reset: Iterations to pause refinement after opacity reset
tooltip.prune_ratio: Final fraction of Gaussians to prune at the end of sparsification

sh_degree.0: Diffuse only — fastest, no view-dependent color
sh_degree.3: Third-order SH — best quality, most VRAM

mask_mode.none: Train on the entire image, no masking
mask_mode.segment: Use the segmentation mask for foreground
mask_mode.ignore: Ignore masked pixels in the loss
mask_mode.alpha_consistent: Enforce alpha consistency with the mask

scene.cannot_delete_training: Cannot delete while training is in progress

messages.err_distorted_images: Distorted images detected. Enable --gut or --undistort to train on cameras with distortion.
messages.err_ortho_not_supported: Training on cameras with ortho model is not supported yet.
messages.err_non_pinhole: Enable --gut or --undistort to train on cameras with non-pinhole model.

selection.update_depth_failed: Could not update selection depth filter.

ellipsoid.title: Ellipsoid
ellipsoid.instructions: Enter: Commit selection | Ctrl+C: Copy contents

tooltip.ppisp_mode: Auto uses the trained controller, Manual allows slider adjustments
tooltip.ppisp_color_rgb: Shift chromaticity for this color channel
tooltip.lod_enabled: Enable hierarchical level-of-detail rendering for RAD files
tooltip.lod_max_splats: Maximum number of splats in the dynamic LOD cut; disabling LOD renders the full RAD leaf set
tooltip.lod_page_pool_splats: VRAM page-pool budget in splats for streamed RAD scenes (0 = auto)
tooltip.lod_pool_vram_fraction: Share of free VRAM granted to the out-of-core LOD page pool
tooltip.lod_fade_frames: Frames a newly streamed LOD page fades in over (0 = instant)
tooltip.lod_render_scale: Quality multiplier: effective splat target = LOD Budget x Render Scale
tooltip.lod_cone_foveation: Peripheral Level of Detail penalty factor (1.0 = no penalty)
tooltip.lod_cone_inner_degrees: Inner cone angle in degrees (no penalty inside this angle)
tooltip.lod_cone_outer_degrees: Outer cone angle in degrees (full penalty beyond this angle)
tooltip.lod_debug_mode: Color splats by their Level of Detail level for debugging
tooltip.desaturate_cropping: Dim outside crop area instead of hiding
tooltip.hide_outside_depth_box: Hide Gaussians outside the selection depth box
tooltip.fov: Camera field of view in degrees
tooltip.focal_length: Focal length in mm (35mm full-frame equivalent)
tooltip.point_cloud_mode: Render as points instead of splats
tooltip.seq_clip_duration: Clip duration (click to edit, in seconds)
tooltip.seq_snap: Snap keyframes to grid (right-click for options)
tooltip.seq_load_sequence: Load a folder of PLY frames as a sequencer clip
tooltip.seq_sequence_fps: PLY sequence playback FPS (click to edit)
tooltip.seq_quality: CRF quality (lower = better quality, larger file)
tooltip.simplify_source: Selected splat node used as the simplification input
tooltip.simplify_target: Target number of Gaussians to keep in the simplified result
tooltip.simplify_lod_base: LOD base used to choose per-pass simplification levels
tooltip.simplify_knn_k: Neighborhood size used to evaluate merge candidates
tooltip.simplify_merge_cap: Maximum fraction of Gaussians that can merge in a single pass
tooltip.simplify_opacity_prune: Prune Gaussians below this opacity threshold before merging
tooltip.simplify_output: Name of the new simplified splat node that will be added to the scene
tooltip.simplify_apply: Create a new simplified splat node from the selected source
tooltip.simplify_cancel: Cancel the active splat simplify job
tooltip.transform_position_axis: Translate the selection along this axis
tooltip.transform_rotation_axis: Rotate the selection around this axis (degrees)
tooltip.transform_scale_axis: Scale the selection along this axis
tooltip.transform_space: Choose local or world transform space
tooltip.transform_pivot: Choose the pivot used for transforms
tooltip.transform_position: Position values for the selected target
tooltip.transform_rotation: Rotation values for the selected target
tooltip.transform_scale: Scale values for the selected target
tooltip.selection_depth_near: Near edge of the selection depth box
tooltip.selection_depth_far: Far edge of the selection depth box
tooltip.gt_compare_mode: Choose RGB, normal, or depth ground-truth comparison
tooltip.depth_view_near: Near edge of the depth-map range
tooltip.depth_view_far: Far edge of the depth-map range
tooltip.environment_mode: Background source: solid color or HDRI
tooltip.environment_rotation: Rotate HDRI around the vertical axis
tooltip.voxel_size: Voxel grid cell size for spatial queries
tooltip.axes_size: Length of the coordinate axis lines
tooltip.grid_plane: Plane on which the grid is drawn
tooltip.camera_frustum_scale: Visual scale of the camera frustums
tooltip.camera_metrics_mode: Image-quality metrics shown over training cameras
tooltip.selection_color_center_marker: Color used for the selection center marker
tooltip.mesh_shadow_enabled: Cast and receive shadows on mesh
tooltip.ppisp_vignette_enabled: Apply vignette as part of correction

environment_mode.solid_color: Render with a flat background color
environment_mode.equirect: Render with a 360° HDR environment map

grid_plane.yz: Show grid on the YZ plane (right view)
grid_plane.xz: Show grid on the XZ plane (top view)
grid_plane.xy: Show grid on the XY plane (front view)

camera_metrics.psnr_ssim: Show PSNR and SSIM per training camera

ppisp_mode.auto: Auto: use the trained controller for correction

exit_popup.title: Exit Application?
exit_popup.message: Are you sure you want to exit?
exit_popup.unsaved_warning: Any unsaved changes will be lost.

load_dataset_popup.title: Load Dataset
load_dataset_popup.help_text: Training checkpoints, logs, and exported models will be saved to the output directory.
load_dataset_popup.max_width_hint: Images wider than this are downscaled. 0 disables the cap.
load_dataset_popup.min_track_length_hint: Keeps sparse points observed in at least this many images. 0 disables filtering.
load_dataset_popup.min_track_length_init_warning: Ignored while Init PLY is set.

input_settings.title: INPUT SETTINGS
input_settings.conflict_message: {trigger} is already assigned to {action} in {mode}. Replace that binding?
input_settings.double_click_hint: Tip: Double-click to bind double-click action
input_settings.click_or_drag_mouse: Click or drag with a mouse button...
input_settings.press_key_or_use_mouse: Press a key or use the mouse...
input_settings.select_tool_mode: Select tool mode to view/edit bindings
input_settings.global_bindings_hint: Global bindings apply everywhere unless overridden

startup.drop_files_title: Drop files here to get started
startup.drop_files_subtitle: PLY, SOG, SPZ, RAD, USD, COLMAP dataset, or Project file
startup.drop_files_hint: Or use File > Import Dataset / Import Ply
startup.drop_to_import_subtitle: PLY, SOG, SPZ, RAD, USD, COLMAP dataset, or Project

resume_checkpoint_popup.title: Resume Checkpoint
resume_checkpoint_popup.help_text: The dataset path stored in the checkpoint may have changed. Update it if needed.

mesh2splat.title: Mesh to Splat
mesh2splat.tooltip_gaussian_scale: Standard deviation of each Gaussian. Controls visual spread.
mesh2splat.tooltip_quality: Controls how densely the mesh surface is sampled. Higher values produce more Gaussians.
mesh2splat.tooltip_max_resolution: Maximum resolution for the sampling grid. Higher values allow finer sampling at quality 1.0.

disk_space_dialog.title: Insufficient Disk Space
disk_space_dialog.insufficient_space_prefix: Not enough disk space to save the file:
disk_space_dialog.instruction: Please free up disk space or choose a different location.

video_extractor.title: Extract Frames from Video
video_extractor.select_preview: Select a video file to preview
video_extractor.pattern_tooltip: Use %d for frame number (e.g., frame_%04d for zero-padded)
video_extractor.sharpness_mode_desc_threshold: Discards frames with sharpness below the threshold. 0 = no filtering.
video_extractor.sharpness_mode_desc_window: Evaluates a subset of frames in each interval and saves the sharpest. Choose how many candidates to evaluate with the dropdown below.
video_extractor.overwrite_prompt: Output folder already contains extracted frames or extraction metadata. Remove generated files in this folder and proceed?

plugin_marketplace.title_line: Browse installable plugins from the plugin registry.
plugin_marketplace.warning_body: WARNING: LFS does not directly endorse or assume responsibility. Use at your own risk.
plugin_marketplace.edit_list_hint: Check your registry configuration or internet connection.
plugin_marketplace.confirm_uninstall_message: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{name}"?

sequencer.empty_hint: Position camera and press K to add keyframes
sequencer.easing_tooltip:
Easing controls outgoing motion
(last keyframe has no outgoing segment)

file_association.title: Set as Default Application
file_association.message: Would you like to set LichtFeld Studio as the default application for splat files (.ply, .sog, .spz, .rad, .usd, .usda, .usdc, .usdz)?

histogram.status_drag_delete: Left-drag to mark a range, then delete it  ·  Ctrl+scroll to zoom  ·  double-click to fit
histogram.status_selection: Marked range becomes the active Gaussian selection.

compare.status_selection: Marked compare region becomes the active Gaussian selection.

empty.title: Compare unavailable
empty.message: Choose a second metric to see how two Gaussian properties cluster together.

metric_unavailable.title: Compare metric unavailable
metric_unavailable.message: The comparison metric could not be read from the combined Gaussian model.

no_visible_values.title: No comparable values
no_visible_values.message: The selected metric pair does not contain any visible finite samples to visualize.

delete_failed.title: Delete Failed
delete_failed.unexpected: The delete pipeline raised an unexpected error.
delete_failed.invalid_result: The delete pipeline returned an invalid result.
delete_failed.reported_failure: The delete pipeline reported a failure.

unavailable.title: Histogram unavailable
unavailable.message: Switch to a view or edit scene with Gaussian splats to inspect a distribution.

no_scene.title: No scene loaded
no_scene.message: Load a Gaussian scene, then reopen the histogram panel.

no_visible_gaussians.title: No visible Gaussians
no_visible_gaussians.message: The histogram only works when the active scene exposes a visible Gaussian model.

metric_unavailable.title: Metric unavailable
metric_unavailable.message: The selected metric could not be read from the combined Gaussian model.

no_visible_values.title: No visible values
no_visible_values.message: The selected metric does not contain any visible finite samples to visualize.

no_selected_values.title: No samples in selection
no_selected_values.message: The selected models contain no finite samples for this metric.

position_x.label: Position X
position_x.description: Gaussian world-space center on the X axis.

position_y.label: Position Y
position_y.description: Gaussian world-space center on the Y axis.

position_z.label: Position Z
position_z.description: Gaussian world-space center on the Z axis.

scale_x.label: Scale X
scale_x.description: Activated Gaussian scale on the X axis.

scale_y.label: Scale Y
scale_y.description: Activated Gaussian scale on the Y axis.

scale_z.label: Scale Z
scale_z.description: Activated Gaussian scale on the Z axis.

scale_max.label: Scale Max
scale_max.description: Largest activated scale component per Gaussian.

volume.label: Volume
volume.description: Ellipsoid volume derived from activated Gaussian scales.

anisotropy.label: Anisotropy
anisotropy.description: Ratio of largest to smallest activated scale. 1 is sphere-like; larger values are spikier.

erank.label: Effective Rank
erank.description: Entropy-based effective rank of activated Gaussian scales. 1 is line-like, 2 is sheet-like, 3 is sphere-like.

distance.label: Distance
distance.description: Distance from the current splat center.
